title: Smart Campus System
summary: A campus management platform for attendance, notices, student profiles, events, and faculty communication.
overview: A polished college project that demonstrates real-world CRUD workflows, role-based access, dashboards, and responsive UI.
problem: Many student projects look too basic and fail to show real product thinking.
solution: A multi-role campus platform with student, faculty, and admin modules designed like a practical SaaS product.
